result.stdout:
usage: gitignore COMMAND [OPTIONS]
version: 0.0.6.0

create .gitignore file from GitHub's github/gitignore repository app.

Global options:
  -v[=VALUE]                 Output verbosity.

Available commands:
        list                 list available template names.
        new                  create .gitignore from given name.
